Container.Overview: Auto-containerized from https://github.com/docker/getting-started. Stack: Node.js / Express.js. Generated by TITAN Unraid Dockerizer v2.9. Auto-updates when upstream releases a new version via GitHub Actions.
Container.Description: docker-demo — Node.js application (Express.js). Source: https://github.com/docker/getting-started. Managed by TITAN Dockerizer v2.9.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Main web port for docker-demo. Opens http://[IP]:[PORT:3000]/

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent application data for docker-demo. Backed up with Unraid.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID. 99=nobody (Unraid default). Match with: id nobody

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID. 100=users (Unraid default). Match with: id nobody

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File creation mask. 022 = owner rw, group/other read-only.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone. Examples: Asia/Dubai, America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Riyadh
